DFATools 1.0.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Single-series scaling

Detrended fluctuation analysis of one series.

dfa()
Detrended Fluctuation Analysis
plotdfa()
Plot DFA

Cross-correlation

Detrended cross-, partial- and multiple-correlation coefficients.

rhodcca()
rho Detrended Cross-Correlation Coefficient
rhodpcca()
rho Detrended Partial Cross-Correlation Coefficient
dmc2()
rho Detrended Multiple-Correlation Coefficient
plotrdcca()
Plot rho-DCCA
plotdcca()
Plot DCCA

Detrended fractal regression

Scale-wise regression coefficients and effect sizes.

betadfa()
Beta DFA
sbdfa()
Standardized Beta DFA
fracreg()
Multiple Fractal Regression
effsizeDFA()
f² scale-wise effect sizes

Coefficient inference and diagnostics

Robust standard errors, wild-bootstrap confidence intervals and collinearity diagnostics for the scale-wise coefficients.

fracreg.diag()
Scale-wise collinearity diagnostics for the fractal regression
fracreg.WB()
Wild bootstrap inference for the fractal regression

Significance tests

Surrogate-based tests for the scale-wise coefficients.

fracreg.PStest()
Podobnik-Shen Test
fracreg.Ktest()
Kristoufek Test
fracreg.IUTest()
Intersection-Union Test

On this page
